content:
type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Adding domain parameter support to trans tag (parse, _make_node, _install_callables)

fields.summary: Adding domain parameter support to trans tag (parse, _make_node, _install_callables)

content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: added domain= param to trans parse() (new domain var before variables loop, checked via 'if token.value == "domain"' with own duplicate/type validation), _make_node() now takes domain arg and emits dgettext/dngettext Call nodes instead of gettext/ngettext when set, and _install_callables/_install/_install_null now wire up dgettext/dngettext globals with fallback wrappers. All existing tests pass. Please rebase your trans_metadata parsing on top of this (domain block sits right after the token.value in variables check, before the assign/trimmed branches) rather than reverting it.

fields.summary: Done: added domain= param to trans parse() (new domain var before variables loop, checked via 'if token.value == "domain"' with own duplicate/type validation), _make_node() now takes domain arg and emits dgettext/dngettext Call nodes instead of gettext/ngettext when set, and _install_callables/_install/_install_null now wire up dgettext/dngettext globals with fallback wrappers. All existing tests pass. Please rebase your trans_metadata parsing on top of this (domain block sits right after the token.value in variables check, before the assign/trimmed branches) rather than reverting it.
